current_implementation: Transformation artifacts existed as templates and historical records without a canonical standalone-host writer path.
baseline_measurement_method: count proof artifact authoring plus transformation record authoring before the standalone transformation helper existed
proposed_change: Add canonical transformation-proof and transformation-record writers plus standalone-host CLI/API support.
preservation_claim: Keep the transformation-proof schema shape and the transformation-record operating fields while making emission product-owned.
expected_measurement_method: count the remaining operator step once canonical writers exist
evaluator_command: npm run check:directive-standalone-runtime-host && npm run check:directive-standalone-api-host
correctness_preserved: yes - the transformation proof still satisfies the canonical schema and the standalone host still stays bounded/local
metric_improvement_measured: yes - one canonical helper now emits the transformation proof artifact shape
rollback_path: Delete the generated transformation proof and transformation record artifacts.
mission_alignment: Improve Runtime's behavior-preserving transformation lane as part of Directive Workspace system quality.
